exampleFlows.title: Introduction to Computer Science — Final Exam
exampleFlows.description: Closed book examination. All electronic devices must be switched off. Answers must be submitted before the end time.

exampleFlows.title: Advanced Mathematics — Midterm
exampleFlows.description: Open book. Calculators are permitted. Problem sets 1–5 only.

_note: Sample flow configurations for demonstration. flowTypeId and flowPurposeId are resolved at runtime from the licence.
